name: Execution from Non-Executable Folder
description: Detects the execution of programs from directories where executables are not typically expected, such as the Recycle Bin, user profile directories, or system folders. This can indicate suspicious or malicious activity, as malware may attempt to hide in these locations.

prompts.prompt: Executable detected running from an unusual or non-executable folder. This is a high-risk indicator of potential malware or defense evasion. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **Image Path** {Image}, **Parent Image Path** {ParentImage}, **Command Line** {CommandLine}, **User** {User}, **Computer** {Computer}. Investigate this critical event immediately for signs of compromise.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path of the executed file.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path of the parent process.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the process.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The computer on which the event occurred.
